meaning: n.(不分性别的美国)国会议员(尤指众议员)
examples: You should also make your views known to your congressperson.
You can write a letter, you can talk about it to your Congressperson, you can talk to people in bars.
And the ask is simple: contact your Congressperson and demand support for immigrant reform.
Tell your congressperson that the time for partisanship and politics is over.
Everyone, even the most intransigent Congressperson, wants better treatments for cancer, heart disease, genetic diseases, infections, and the many other illnesses that afflict us.
